creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
A new version of CRM114 is available

Fix: The included patch updates to the latest version, and also includes
'shuffle.crm' in the examples dir.

===== PATCH: cut here =====


After applying this patch, portlint says:
$ portlint /usr/ports/mail/crm114
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a WITHOUT_NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

crh--HfPKGVIwLSCN2Hz8k2hSnpHFJDrjLj46u8JvIpEpRrQy9qoi
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ru crm114_orig/Makefile crm114/Makefile
--- crm114_orig/Makefile	Wed Mar 28 11:43:04 2007
+++ crm114/Makefile	Wed Mar 28 11:45:24 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	crm114
-PORTVERSION=	20061103
+PORTVERSION=	20070301
 # WARNING change versionname in CRM114RELEASENAME too.
 # portlint didn't like this variable at this place.
 # So I have to put it down in this file.
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
 # there is no other then formail on this planet
 RUN_DEPENDS=	procmail:${PORTSDIR}/mail/procmail
 
-CRM114RELEASENAME=BlameDalkey
+CRM114RELEASENAME=BlameBaltar
 
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
 USE_ICONV=	yes
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@
 		priolist.mfp whitelist.mfp blacklist.mfp classifytest.crm \
 		exectest.crm inserttest_a.crm inserttest_b.crm learntest.crm \
 		matchtest.crm overalterisolatedtest.crm windowtest.crm \
-		mailreaver.crm maillib.crm
+		mailreaver.crm shuffle.crm maillib.crm
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -Ee 's,^((LD|C)FLAGS),#\1,;;s,^(prefix=),#\1,;;s,^(.*-install),#\1,' \
diff -ru crm114_orig/distinfo crm114/distinfo
--- crm114_orig/distinfo	Wed Mar 28 11:43:04 2007
+++ crm114/distinfo	Wed Mar 28 11:55:36 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (crm114-20061103-BlameDalkey.src.tar.gz) = 6c1dc26f7187768cfd3b6216a0ea0ddd
-SHA256 (crm114-20061103-BlameDalkey.src.tar.gz) = 63bfbc44460fcb4c818cd72b482d10cc3b62cc5fffe9337248c814b5e2066ab8
-SIZE (crm114-20061103-BlameDalkey.src.tar.gz) = 1055458
+MD5 (crm114-20070301-BlameBaltar.src.tar.gz) = 83c574b647f67d05ac1df7ddfac91d09
+SHA256 (crm114-20070301-BlameBaltar.src.tar.gz) = 2a9dd3ebd1ab79ff4fd898ec12ced88baca5aee283fa5b3a35f16de833b59802
+SIZE (crm114-20070301-BlameBaltar.src.tar.gz) = 1095192
diff -ru crm114_orig/pkg-plist crm114/pkg-plist
--- crm114_orig/pkg-plist	Wed Mar 28 11:43:04 2007
+++ crm114/pkg-plist	Wed Mar 28 11:45:50 2007
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mailreaver.crm
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/maillib.crm
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/mailtrainer.crm
+%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/shuffle.crm
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/matchtest.crm
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/overalterisolatedtest.crm
 %%EXAMPLESDIR%%/windowtest.crm
Only in crm114: work
===== EOF =====
How-To-Repeat: 	NA
